OfflineHWID: Put HWID here (For offline mode only)

Watermark.CustomMethodCode: public static String method() {    return "Protected by YuShengJun";}

fields.label: Input
fields.description: Input JAR file name. This value is synced automatically after the main JAR is uploaded.

fields.label: Output
fields.description: Output JAR file name. The server writes the obfuscated artifact to the current session output directory.

fields.label: Libraries
fields.description: Dependency JAR file names. This list is synced automatically after files are uploaded from Advanced.

fields.label: Exclusions
fields.description: Global exclusion rules. Matching classes or members skip selected processing steps.

fields.label: MixinPackage
fields.description: Mixin package path list used by related Minecraft rename logic.

fields.label: DumpMappings
fields.description: Export rename mappings for debugging and symbol tracing.

fields.label: ControllableRandom
fields.description: Use a fixed base seed so repeated runs with the same seed produce stable random-driven output.

fields.label: InputSeed
fields.description: Base seed used when ControllableRandom is enabled.

fields.label: Multithreading
fields.description: Enable parallel processing. This can improve speed but uses more CPU resources.

fields.label: PrintTimeUsage
fields.description: Print stage timing information to the console output.

fields.label: Profiler
fields.description: Print per-transformer execution timing to the log output.

fields.label: ForceUseComputeMax
fields.description: Force ASM COMPUTE_MAXS when rebuilding methods.

fields.label: LibsMissingCheck
fields.description: Check for missing dependency libraries before processing. Recommended when external dependencies exist.

fields.label: CustomDictionaryFile
fields.description: Custom dictionary asset file name. Upload the asset first when Dictionary is set to Custom.

fields.label: DictionaryStartIndex
fields.description: Starting index used by the generated dictionary sequence.

fields.label: CorruptOutput
fields.description: Produce intentionally corrupted output. Keep disabled unless you need this special mode.

fields.label: RemoveTimeStamps
fields.description: Set ZIP entry timestamps to zero when writing the output archive.

fields.label: CompressionLevel
fields.description: ZIP compression level used for the output archive.

fields.label: ArchiveComment
fields.description: ZIP archive comment written to the output JAR.

fields.label: FileRemovePrefix
fields.description: Output resource name prefixes to remove during post processing.

fields.label: FileRemoveSuffix
fields.description: Output resource name suffixes to remove during post processing.
